name_en: M30317 Monogram (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized, chip changeable! Zippy Zipper Vertical Wallet. This Louis Vuitton Zippy vertical zipper wallet is crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, offering a stylish and practical design ideal for carrying credit cards and cash. It features a secure all-around zipper construction with multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and several bill and receipt compartments. 10 x 20 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
